allergy_notices: Contains numerous plant extracts; risk of sensitization/contact dermatitis, specifically Lavender and Orange Oil.
safety_logic_triggers.usage_advice: Final step of morning routine only. Reapply every 2 hours during direct exposure. Chemical filter dominant formulation; use with caution if skin barrier is compromised.
